user.title: Select providers
user.description: Choose which LLM providers to monitor.

api_keys.title: Optional API keys
api_keys.description: Provide API keys for active checks. Leave any provider blank to use passive monitoring only.

scan_interval.title: Polling interval
scan_interval.description: Set how often the providers are checked.
